feedback.text: Hello, I have recently met with a rather immense matter of removing my account from the Crunchyroll service owned by Sony Pictures. Despite my disagreement, I started sending me an unsolicited email, so I decided to delete my account. On their website, I found information on how to delete the account, but the instructions had become obsolete as the web interface did not make it possible to proceed (no buttons/links he talked about). In support, I learned that I can only delete my account via the mobile app which I have installed and tried to delete the account in the settings. As a result, I entered a deletion request in my setup, for which I have not yet received confirmation that my account and data have been removed from the Crunchyroll service. I consider such practices of withholding services to be at least a dubious practice and I think that services should facilitate as much as possible simple operations such as account withdrawal.
